scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix server && npm ci --prefix client
scripts.test: npm test --prefix server && npm test --prefix client
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && cross-env VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:2100/api npm run build --prefix client
scripts.audit: npm audit --prefix server --audit-level=high && npm audit --prefix client --audit-level=high
scripts.check: npm run scan:secrets && npm run test && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run audit
